text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is trying hard at weight loss
training, but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
To think, running gets this tough from gaining just
a little weight.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I can't do it like before... I've lost my full poweeer!
choice_data_list:
Then let's go full power at getting you back on
track!

Then let's go full power at getting you back on
track!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What?! Of course... I've just gotta go... all out!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Raaaah! This weight means nothing to me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I need to get my full power back! I won't let
anything hold me down!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Work hard, me! Don't lose, me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket devotes herself to running, and
soon finds herself back in excellent shape!
